# Span

> Individual span within a distributed trace

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| traceId | string | yes | - | Parent trace ID |
| spanId | string | yes | - | Unique span identifier |
| parentSpanId | string | yes | - | Parent span ID (null for root spans) |
| operationName | string | yes | - | Span operation name |
| serviceName | string | yes | - | Service that generated this span |
| startTime | string | yes | - | ISO datetime span started |
| endTime | string | yes | - | ISO datetime span ended |
| durationMs | integer | yes | - | Span duration in milliseconds |
| kind | internal \| client \| server \| producer \| consumer | yes | internal | OpenTelemetry span kind |
| status | ok \| error \| unset | yes | unset | Span status |
| attributes | json | yes | - | OpenTelemetry span attributes |
| events | json | yes | - | Span events/logs |
| llmCallId | string | yes | - | Associated LLM call ID if this span represents an LLM invocation |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- belongsTo **Trace** (via `traceId`)

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/span` — List all
- `POST /api/span` — Create
- `GET /api/span/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/span/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/span/:id` — Delete
